description: Persist every chat event to a raw-log memory database and maintain one daily summary record in a separate memory database.

memories.purpose: Retain complete chat event facts for audit and later summarization.

files.description: Stored file references copied into the memory root. Supports image, video, audio, PDF, text, and generic files.

memories.description: One updated summary record per conversation and UTC day.
memories.purpose: Give workflow nodes compact daily chat context without loading all raw logs.

rawFileCount.description: Total number of files seen in raw records summarized by this daily row.
